---
title: "TrajectoryList.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\TrajectoryList.tsx"
loc: 26
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.90
style_score: 3.39
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 4.51
---

## Intent
The `TrajectoryList.tsx` module displays a chronological log of agent movements (trajectories) within the neural graph. It provides a visual history of file mutations and system interactions, allowing architects to track the path of autonomous operations.

## Interaction Protocol
This component is rendered within the selection or playback panels. It receives an array of `Trajectory` objects and renders them as a stylized, scrollable list of historical agent activities.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [Trajectory](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `TrajectoryList`
- `TrajectoryList`
